resources: VSS is not supported on xStd or xPro plans. One or more of your cameras have expired licenses or are not yet licensed. All features remain available for now. Please renew or activate your licenses as soon as possible. If you wish to switch to the xLite plan, please check the downgrade requirements. https://www.vortexcloud.com/platform/vortex-ai One or more of your cameras have expired licenses or are not yet licensed. Please contact your reseller to renew or activate your licenses and retain full access to VORTEX. If you wish to switch to the xLite plan, please check the downgrade requirements. VORTEX Saved Playback PLAYBACK Standard control Fisheye control Date & Time Cancel Apply My account Sign out Delete account Can not delete Your account is an organization owner. Transfer the organization owner to another user account on portal. Since you are an organization owner, there are devices in your organization.\n\nIf you want to delete your account, you need to delete all devices. Settings Are you sure you want to sign out? E-mail Password Debug Your current plan The xLite plan allows up to 128 channels per organization, including Direct-to-Cloud and Bridge-to-Cloud cameras. Channel usage +%d over limit Upgrade plan Upgrade to a VORTEX plan to connect more than 128 channels. OR Manage NVR devices Manage VSS devices Adjust current setup To continue with the xLite plan, reduce the number of devices so the total stays under 128 channels. For Direct-to-Cloud cameras, adjustments can only be made in the VORTEX web portal. Add device Please scan the QR code on the device. And make sure the code is steady and well-it. Enter the device ID to add the device to your organization. You can find a 12-digit code right below the QR Code on the device ID label on your device. To connect VSS to VORTEX: \nNavigate to VSS > Settings > VORTEX Connect to obtain the device ID Invalid device ID format. Please check your device ID. Device settings Device ID VSS Failed to add Device can not be added twice. Maximum 1000 devices are reached. VSS is not supported on xStd or xPro plans. Please delete VSS to continue the upgrade. Talk via device Speak via Failed to establish a connection with the device. Try again later. xPro only Export video Add video to archive %d sec %d min %d hour Time limits between %s - %s. Maximum %s. Export Exporting… Failed to export Exporting 1 file. See notifications for detail. Only one video file can be exported at a time from the associated NVR or VSS. Please try again later. Share video Share to public Anyone on the internet with the link can view this video. Link settings Link expiration Password protection Allow viewer to download Share via QR Code Send link to… Choose validity Expire in Expire on Access password Anyone with the link can view the video using this password. 8–64 characters Choose a future expiration date. Share video via QR code Show this QR code to your recipient to share the video instantly. PTZ control Zoom Focus PTZ Preset position No preset positions Visit the web portal to create your preset position. Patrol tour No patrol tour Visit the web portal to create your patrol tour. Stop patrol RECORD No patrol has been set up for this camera. Delete this device Are you sure you want to delete? The cameras under NVR will also be deleted. Are you sure you want to delete? The peripheral devices under this bridge will also be deleted. Are you sure you want to delete selected devices? The cameras under VSS will also be deleted.\nAre you sure you want to delete selected devices? WARNING! The action CANNOT be undone.\nOnce you delete the device, all its data including video on the SD card and VORTEX platform will be permanently erased.\nAdditionally, any other devices or configurations that rely on this device will also be removed as part of this action. The action CANNOT be undone.\nOnce you delete the device, all its data including video on VORTEX platform will be permanently erased. The action CANNOT be undone.\nOnce you delete the device, all its data on VORTEX platform will be permanently erased. The action CANNOT be undone.\nOnce you delete the device, all its data including video on VORTEX platform will be permanently erased. The action CANNOT be undone.\nOnce deleted, the file will be permanently erased and cannot be recovered. Please type the word %s to confirm. Delete Cancel Set password Enter password Re-enter password Set Setting... Failed to set Passwords do not match. Incorrect password. New Confirm Your password must have : 8–64 characters with no space. At least one uppercase alphabetic character. At least one lowercase alphabetic character. One numeric character. At least one special character (for example ~ ! ? @ # $ ). Organization name Enter organization name Type of organization Learn more VORTEX xPro License Manage VORTEX Cameras and existing ONVIF Cameras in one single platform. Enjoy automated surveillance, enterprise security protection, advanced AI-powered search and third-party integration. Free Cloud-Managed Service Elevate your existing cameras with remote troubleshooting and multi-site management. Simply lift and shift up to 128 ONVIF cameras with VORTEX Connect via VIVOTEK NVR. Unlicensed Licensed Unsupported codec Awaiting device to get connected Go to Troubleshooting Device Search device Search view Edit username Enter at least 1 character Username must be between 1 and 128 characters. Failed to sign in Failed to continue Failed to continue. Please try again. Failed to create Failed to connect to server. Network Unavailable An organization name cannot contain space and any following characters Maximum 5 archiving files are reached on this camera.\nPlease try again later. Maximum 5 archiving files are reached on this nvr. Please try again later. Delete file OK Incorrect email address or password. Password cannot be empty. Email address cannot be empty. Invalid email address. Sign-in is blocked You\'ve tried to sign in too many times with an incorrect account or password. You\'ve tried to sign in too many times with an incorrect verification code. Activation required We\'ve sent you an activation email Failed to send activation email Check your email at %s and follow the instruction to activate your account in 24 hours. Your account has not been activated yet.\nSend an activation email to activate your account. Close Failed to sign out VORTEX needs permission Please enable necessary permission in your device settings. A factory restore removes all of your settings. Do you want to restore? Cannot take photo Failed to take photo. Please try again. No video content analysis in this period. You can try another period for more video content analysis. Site Site name Create site View Scene Archive Delete this device NVR settings Bridge settings Since you are an organization owner, we will also delete the organization when you delete the account.\n\nAre you sure you want to delete? Delete Failed to load Failed to delete Camera settings Camera information NVR information NVR NVR name Bridge information Bridge Share management Service Organization settings Theme Developer Options Camera name Firmware version Time zone Restore to factory default Restore settings to factory default VIDEO Orientation Video orientation ORIENTATION Orientation ALARM Restore settings Reboot Restore Device name Source NVR Save Create account Forget password Done Add another device Congratulation Signing in... Sign in Sign in with SSO By continuing, you agree to VORTEX\'s Privacy Policy and End User Agreement Privacy policy End User Agreement Adding... Add Live LIVE FIRMWARE Firmware App version AVAILABLE UPGRADE Available upgrade This will erase all recording data and custom settings. Update Check for updates For more information, please visit this website : Your firmware is up to date. Rebooting device... About Ⓒ 2024 VIVOTEK. All Rights Reserved. Privacy policy Terms of use Message settings Mark all as read Delete all messages Device is disconnected Failed to reboot %s has been archived successfully Play Try again Device is disconnected.\nPlease check your device. Archiving files See all All files More by devices Edit file name Share this file Copy link Download this file Delete this file No archived files No recent files Archiving... Waiting... Success Failed to archive All files are archived. Cancel archiving File will be removed from the queue. Are you sure you want to cancel ? Resume File information Archive this file again File name Select 1 camera Continue Watch playback Failed to cancel You have been signed out For security reasons, your connection times out after you have been inactive for a while. Please sign in again. Please try again later. Failed to save Information File information Date of archived Date of footage Video length Video size Created by Download Download this file It might take a long time to download.\nDo you want to download? Failed to download Preparing... Video quality Fit screen with ratio SD HD Hybrid (HD & SD) SD only PREVIEW Preview Right Left Flip Mirror Playback speed 0.25x 0.5x Normal 2x 4x 8x Organization requests %s has invited you to join this organization. Accept Accepting... Reject Rejecting... It looks like you are new to VORTEX There aren\'t any organization for Create an organization Try a different email Create organization Create Creating... Ready to start? Add devices and get started to experience the brand new VORTEX. Move to Move Will be moved to Failed to move Search time zone Search bridge Search NVR Search VSS Search location Are you sure you want to move this device to %s? No search results Connection limit Connection limit has been reached.\nFailed to connect this camera.\nPlease try again later. Recording Recorded New version available A new version of this app is available. Model Local IP %s days - PREM User privileges changed The user privilege of the account you are currently signed in with has been changed.\nPlease click OK to refresh. Failed to share Link copied. Name Retain device original settings Device name and time zone settings will be kept as originally configured on the device. Your device has been successfully added to VORTEX Maximum 10 sites reached. Contact your reseller to upgrade your service. Authentication error There was an issue with your authentication. Please sign in via remote access again to continue. Switch Account You will switch accounts from %s to %s. Switch Link a Reseller for Better Support! Get assistance from an reseller for device deployment, license renewal, status monitoring, and remote access setup. Go to reseller management Don’t remind me again No reseller added yet Remote access System issue notifications Enable this option to automatically notify your reseller via email when critical system issues are detected.  See which critical system issues... Delete reseller Add a reseller to receive ongoing support. • License renewal and connection monitoring • Remote technical support • Device deployment assistance Add reseller Request a reseller Enter email Delete service reseller Are you sure you want to delete your service reseller? Keep Allow remote access Temporally allow reseller to access your VORTEX User Portal. You can revoke this access at anytime. Allow Revoke access Reseller will no longer have access to your VORTEX User Portal. Revoke Invalid reseller email Please check the email address or contact your reseller. Failed to delete your reseller. Try again later. Failed to turn off Failed to turn off system issues notification. Try again later. Failed to turn on Failed to turn on system issues notification. Try again later. Failed to allow remote access. Try again later. Failed to revoke Failed to revoke remote access. Try again later. Critical system issues • Upgrade Upgrade your service Contact reseller Your reseller will assist with the upgrade process. Contact information Support VORTEX Camera VORTEX Connect Cameras Unlimited Up to 128 cameras Users Up to 10 users\n(No permission mgt.) Alarm notification Mobile push, Email Mobile push\n(No thumbnail) Firmware update Auto OTA/Manual 3rd party integration Cloud archive Secure login See all features Deep search is currently available on VORTEX Camera. Email or password doesn\'t match. This may be because the email needs to be in lowercase, as it is case-sensitive. AI Hub Think search Event insight Sort by time More functions Deep search License plate search License plate Attribute search Search accessories Object type Device Gender Age Upper body clothing color Lower body clothing color Accessories Type Vehicle type Color Search by Any People Vehicle Duration Male Female Adult Child Red Orange Yellow Green Blue Purple Pink Gray Brown White Black Backpack Hat Car Truck Bus Motorcycle Bicycle Face Re-search LicensePlate The selected device does not support this feature. To use this functionality, please choose a compatible device. Share some feedback to us ! Your submission has been received.\nWe will use your feedback to improve VORTEX services. Submission ID: #%s Profile search Profile search (Beta) Profile detail Records Photos Reference photo for AI search Snapshot within 1 month An error occurred Error. Please contact support or try again later Outdated device firmware Later %d of your devices are running an older firmware version. To enjoy the latest features and prevent errors, please update your firmware now.\n\nEach device will undergo a routine 15-minute update, resulting in temporary disconnection. This may impact tasks such as monitoring, archiving, and recording. Failed to update The device firmware update has failed. Please contact support for assistance. Channel limit reached NVR management Set NVR password Please enter a password for your NVR - %s. 8–64 characters with no space At least one alphabetic character At least one numeric character Confirm password NVR setup incomplete There are unfinished NVR configurations. Please contact the owner or admin for assistance. There are unfinished NVR configurations. Please click on the problematic NVR or camera item to complete the configuration. Setting up volume… The system is currently setting up a single storage volume. Please wait until the process is complete. Hard disk not found! No hard disk detected in the NVR.\nPlease contact the reseller for assistance. Volume configuration issue The NVR volume configuration has encountered an issue. Please contact the reseller for assistance. NVR settings complete! Your NVR setup was successful. Leave There are unfinished NVR configurations. Please go to View page and click on the problematic NVR or camera item to complete the configuration. minutes minute hours hour days day Signed Out Looks like your session expired. Sign in again. Time frame End time should be later than starting time. Date range should be limited to 7 days Message All Messages No device events No system events Please check later Device System Search Filter Event type Time frame All time Include unassociated site events %s / %s Selected Select all Deselect all Rule name Camera Device Site Client time Local time Thank you for your feedback. Failed to report The task you are trying to do can\'t be completed because the service is currently busy.\nPlease try again later. Help to correct video content analysis Thanks for your assistance! This video will be sent to the VORTEX team and used to enhance video content analysis. Please note that your submission is considered a data donation. Read more Resolved Update on tampering events If you are sure that the event has been resolved, simply click the \'Resolved\' button to inform the VORTEX system. The VORTEX system has received your feedback. The event has been resolved. Failed to send the feedback Failed to send the feedback. You can try again later. Event resolved I confirm that video content is allowed to be used. Alarm management Pause alarm--> Events Sources Schedule Action Always Custom PAUSE ALARM FOR Select a duration to temporarily pause the alarm. This will disable the alarm notification, but any event messages will still be captured in message center. Apply Pause until %s Resume Alarm？ This action will remove the paused state and activate the alarm. Custom time mins CREATED BY Search alarm Failed to apply Door Elevator Place Ungrouped Cameras Mobile notification Send email Digital output Webhook Audio deterrent No alarms Timezone not set. You can set it via VORTEX User Portal. Intrusion detection Line crossing detection Loitering detection Motion detection Digital input Digital output Tampering detection PPE detection Fall detection Think alert Audio detection Device online Device offline Archive success Archive failed Recording error Video content analysis stopped SD card error The SD card cannot be used. Please replace this SD card. SD card life expectancy Please replace this SD card. Missing object detection Unattended object detection Channel online Channel offline System digital input System digital output Disk failure Disk full PoE error Firmware update failed PIR Face detection Crowd detection Running detection Restricted zone Parking violation Smart tracking an object License plate recognition Facial recognition Parking space detection NVR channel online NVR channel offline NVR disk failure NVR disk full NVR PoE error NVR channel recording error Video content analysis General events General system events Camera system events NVR system events NVR/VSS system events License Plate events Facial events Layout 1 CH 2 CH 4 CH 6 CH 8 CH 16 CH %s/%s Fisheye Standard Original Panoramic Regional Help center Tutorial Help FAQ Send feedback SUBJECT Subject USER First name Last name LOCATION Location Select 1 location CATEGORY Category Device Others Category Select 1 device DESCRIPTION Description Send Sending... Failed to send Failed to connect to server. Thank you for your feedback Your submission has been received.\nWe will be in touch and contact you soon. Sending feedback... Please wait. Device is updating The device is updating firmware.\nPlease try again later. Device will be disconnected Device will be disconnected during the update process.\nThis will affect the tasks you are currently performing, such as monitoring, archiving and recording. System settings Reboot this device Restart this service Recording will stop while the camera is rebooting. Recording will stop while the device is rebooting. Do you want to reboot? Recording will stop while the service is restarting. Recording will stop while the service is restarting. Do you want to restart? Restart Must be 1-64 characters.\nNo special characters: > < ) ( " ; & | $ ' = # % + - \ / * : `\nAnd '.' cannot be the last character. Channels are updating Updates are in progress for other channels on this NVR. Please wait for them to complete before starting new updates. IMAGE Focus adjustment Image focus adjustment Focus Manual Auto FOCUS METHOD Full-range scan focus IRIS Fully-opened iris Auto focus Stop auto focus ZOOM Wide Tele FOCUS Near Far Control PTZ Back to timeline No NVRs %s cameras No VSS %s cameras No Bridges %s devices %s device PERIPHERAL Available peripheral Cameras in NVR Peripherals in BRIDGE PERIPHERAL LIST Add new peripheral VSS information VSS name Camera Cameras in VSS Camera list VSS settings Software Access denied Your account has been removed from this organization by the organization owner.\nYou are about to be signed out. You do not have enough privileges to access this resource—which may have been moved or deleted.\nClicking OK will refresh your page.\n\n\nContact your administrator for more info. Renew your camera license Camera license expired Searchlight ID: %s Door name Door ID Associated site Local time Card holder Operator Controller name Place name Controller ID Elevator name Elevator id Access Access denied Access granted REX unlock Door held open Door force open Door lockdown Door cancelled lockdown Scheduled unlocks started Scheduled unlocks ended Reader tampered Reader name Reader ID Controller tampered Elevator lockdown Elevator cancelled lockdown Place lockdown Place cancelled lockdown Force Open activated Force Open deactivated Force Close activated Force Close deactivated Force Open Force Close Scheduled unlocks override activated Scheduled unlocks override deactivated Scheduled unlocks override No access events Access control point Access control point ID Select all Deselect all %s / %s Selected All doors All controllers All card readers All elevators All places All All devices Door event Lockdown Unlockdown Device tamper All event type Event name from provider Unlock door Select door Choose speaker Choose device DOOR Status Unlock Unlocked Unlocking... Lock Locked Locking... Offline Door and elevator events Failed to unlock the door Failed to lock the door Connection failed We are unable to get the door data. You can try again later, or visit the %s platform to confirm the door status. Failed to unlock the door. You can try again later, or visit the %s platform to confirm the door status. Failed to lock the door. You can try again later, or visit the %s platform to confirm the door status. To use the "Associated site" filter, please select a door in the "Access control point" filter. To use the "Associated site" filter, please select an access control point in the "Access control point" filter. Include the events from sensors not associated with any site Search site Search event type Failed to get door data Door type Elevator - Primary card reader Elevator - Additional card reader Door - Primary card reader Door - Additional card reader Integrate with an Access Control system to unlock this feature. Learn more Integrate with an Access Control system to unlock this feature. Pacific/Tongatapu Pacific/Wake Pacific/Wallis US/Alaska US/Central US/Eastern US/Hawaii US/Mountain US/Pacific Data storage location Notice Select a location Choose where videos and images will be stored. This setting cannot be changed after the organization is created. You are creating an organization with a data storage location in %s. This choice cannot be changed after the organization is created. Organization information Organization owner License plan Reseller management Add your reseller DATA STORAGE LOCATION This is the location where your organization\'s video and image data is stored. Contact support if you need further assistance. False event INSTALLATION Installation MEDIA Media Power line frequency 50 Hz 60 Hz Select to match the local power supply (50Hz or 60Hz) to minimize video flickering. Failed to set power line frequency. SD card status SD card recording Failed to load data after signing in Connecting… Continue Go back Failed to sign in with SSO There was an error logging in with this email address. The credentials provided do not match a valid SSO account. %s/%s cameras have recording errors.\nPlease check your SD card status. Email does not match VORTEX account, please login with correct account. %s%s %s%s (%s) Verify with MFA Please open your authenticator App on your mobile device and enter the 6-digit verification code displayed. MFA configuration 1. Install authenticator App Install an authenticator app like Google Authenticator or Authy on your mobile device. 2. Scan QR code or enter setup key to verify You can either scan the QR code or copy the setup key and paste it into your authenticator app. COPY TO VERIFY Account name Setup key Please make sure that you have finished step 2 before you click Verify. Verify Verifying Account name copied Setup key copied Verify code Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app. To proceed with enabling MFA, please enter your password. To proceed with disabling MFA, please enter your password. Next Setting Invalid code Set up MFA The code you entered is invalid, please try again. Please be aware that MFA is configured solely for VORTEX account logins. If you are using SSO login and require MFA, please reach out to your SSO provider to enable MFA for your account. Enable MFA to secure account with authenticator app. Login requires verifying one-time code generated by the app besides password. Invalid password Password does not match, please try again. Required MFA is now required for all accounts in your organization. Manage snoozed schedule Snooze targe Everyone in organization Only me Pauses all alarm actions for everyone Only pauses mobile notifications and emails sent to you Snooze until Snoozed until %s Pauses all alarm actions for everyone until: %s Only pauses mobile notifications and emails sent to you until: %s Edit Unsnooze Unsnooze all notifications? Unsnooze rule ? This action will remove the paused state for your personal account, enabling mobile notifications and emails sent to you. This action will remove the paused state for all people in the organization, enabling notifications and actions for this rule. You have chosen to snooze the rule for… Snooze for Snooze rule This will temporarily pause notifications and alarm actions for this rule, but the event will still be recorded in the Message Center. Choose duration Snooze time for Snooze for the next Choose a future time to snooze until it is lifted. Failed to apply Failed to unsnooze Edited by: %s No snooze rules Snooze all notifications This will only pauses mobile notifications and emails sent to you, but the event will still be recorded in the Message Center. Timeline legend Represents time segments containing previously recorded footage. Indicates time segments where the camera is actively processing and saving footage. Marks time segments where motion or objects have triggered specific detection rules. 1x Create new site Create Enter address or location Location (Optional) Site %d Set location Drag map to move pin Confirm location Fisheye dewarp mode Camera disconnected Updating… Reached connection limit %s camera is not supported in the Free Cloud-Managed Service. Please upgrade your service. No recording clip No recordings yet, the camera is processing and saving footage. Light Dark System Failed to load video Download Share Oregon N. Virginia Tokyo Osaka Sydney Melbourne Frankfurt Ireland %s : %s (backup) Storage location and its backup : %s We value your privacy agreement To continuously provide you with a safer experience, we’ve updated our Privacy Policy and End User Agreement in accordance with GDPR.\n\nPlease take a moment to review and agree to the latest terms to continue using VORTEX. I agree to VORTEX\'s Privacy Policy and End User Agreement Continue to %s Continuing... Facial recognition Detects and identifies faces in videos to assist in searching and recognition tasks. This feature is commonly used for security monitoring and access control purposes Last modified： Detects and identifies license plates in videos to assist in vehicle tracking and recognition tasks. This feature enhances parking management and traffic monitoring. Last modified: %s on %s I have read and agree to the AI analytics terms and conditions Smart privacy switch VORTEX offers advanced AI features to enhance your search capabilities If you want to enable the AI features below: Please review our AI analytics terms and conditions. These features process personal data and may be subject to privacy regulations in your jurisdiction. Disagree AI analytics terms and conditions Disable facial recognition Disable license plate recognition All features related to facial recognition & license plate recognition will become unavailable. Are you sure you want to disable AI feature controls? All features related to this function will become unavailable. Are you sure you want to disable face recognition? All features related to this function will become unavailable. Are you sure you want to disable license plate recognition? Disabling this feature will permanently delete all associated data (e.g., Profile search) from the VORTEX platform. Disabling this feature will permanently delete all associated data from the VORTEX platform. Disable AI features status changed We\'ve detected a change in AI features status. Please click OK to refresh the page. Failed to disable Failed to connect to server. %d cameras Customized view No views Please create views first More functions More Reorder Reorder functions Most used Device deleted or access revoked No permission Edit name Untitled view Don\'t show again Add cameras into the view Delete view Are you sure you want to delete the view? Edit view name Camera default settings Screen ratio Digital zoom Fisheye dewarp Add cameras Move & swap view cells You can press and hold any cell, then drag it to another position to swap their places. LPR Feature Not Fully Configured The License Plate Recognition (LPR) feature is not fully configured. Please enable this function to enjoy the full license plate recognition capabilities within Deep Search. If you prefer to keep this feature disabled and stop receiving this notification, please enable it once and then disable it again. For more detailed information, please visit here. Leave without saving？ Your changes will be lost if you leave. Leave Stay No items selected yet No devices Add one Let’s create your first view Digital zoom Adjusting digital zoom will just enlarge your view only. It won\'t change camera\'s physical lens or other users\' viewing experience. Confirm page reordering You are changing the order of pages with different numbers of cameras. This will cause the display order of cameras in your view to change. Change Check microphone permission You have not microphone permission.\nPlease check. Send copy Search users name or email Please check your network connection and try again. Failed to connect No users in the organization Failed to copy Shared by %s Copy sent! Sensor No sensor events Add a smart sensor to unlock this feature. Learn more Add a smart sensor to unlock this feature Vape detection THC detection Smoking detection Smoking Air masking detection Air masking Help sounds Aggression sounds Gunshot detection Gunshot Loud sound Motion detection Motion High occupancy count High people count Light level Device taper Temperature Panic button Humidity Health index Air quality index CO CO2 TVOC PM1 PM10 PM2.5 NO2 NH3 Pressure Vaping Safety and security Health Triggered Cleared Sensor name Value Threshold Data source Event state Associated site All sensors Sensor Deep Search is a feature in VORTEX cameras that uses AI to enhance video searching. Instead of going through videos frame by frame, Deep Search sorts through metadata to quickly find specific scenes or attributes. This means you can easily locate moments with certain objects, like people or vehicles. It\'s a smarter, faster way to find exactly what you\'re looking for in your video recordings. To access this feature, contact your reseller for upgrade options. Easily saving key moments to the cloud for fast, organized access anytime. Whether it\’s for incident review, reporting, or team collaboration, archived footage helps you avoid repetitive searching and keeps important evidence right at your fingertips. To access this feature, contact your reseller for upgrade options. Explore more Your organization must meet all requirements below to downgrade to the xLite plan. Downgrade to xLite User account limit Reduce user accounts to maximum 10 users, limited to owner or admin roles only. Channel limit Reduce the number of channels to 128, including both Direct-to-Cloud and Bridge-to-Cloud cameras. Site limit Reduce sites to maximum 10 sites. Remove bridge & peripheral devices You must manually remove all bridge & peripheral devices. Delete archived data You must manually delete all archived data. Remove SSO You must manually disable single sign-on settings. Remove Third-party Integrations You must manually remove all third-party integrations. Delete alarms You must manually delete all alarm configurations, as they are not retained in the xLite plan. Delete API keys You must manually delete all API keys created within your organization. %1$d / %2$d completed Note: Some downgrade requirements must be done on the user portal Downgrade What is xLite plan? The xLite plan supports a limited number of users, cameras, and sites, and offers only a subset of VORTEX features. The key features such as Archive, AI Hub, Profile Search, Cloud Backup, and Peripheral Device Support are not available under the xLite plan. Additionally, for alarm functionality, only mobile push notifications are supported. We recommend retaining your current licensing plan to ensure full access to all VORTEX features License expired! Renew your license One or more of your cameras will require a license renewal soon. Please contact your reseller to get started. One or more of your cameras have expired licenses or are not yet licensed. All features remain available for now. Please renew or activate your licenses as soon as possible. One or more of your cameras have expired licenses or are not yet licensed. Please contact your reseller to renew or activate your licenses and retain full access to VORTEX. Entry-level for customers who want to start small and gradually step into cloud Support VORTEX Connect Up to 128 cameras Up to 10 users but no permission mgt. VSS is now supported on the xLite plan only. Ideal for businesses scaling beyond 128 channels, offering advanced user management, flexible cloud storage Support VORTEX Cameras and VORTEX Connect Unlimited cameras Unlimited users Unlimited role-based access Mobile push notification & Email notification 5GB/per camera of cloud archive Perfect for businesses looking for advanced AI capabilities and 3rd party integration AI Hub with Think search 30GB/per camera of cloud archive Extended warranty for 10 years Camera two-way audio talk down & automatic audio deterrent Current plan Upgrade your license plan! Upgrade your license plan Explore VORTEX license plans and latest package with features Explore plans Explore now License plan upgraded! Your license plan has been upgraded with powerful new features and tools. Discover everything that\'s now available to you. License plan downgraded Your License plan have been downgraded. Please click OK to refresh the system and continue using the latest changes and features. Failed to proceed Refresh VORTEX only supports downgrading when all licenses in the organization (including camera, additional, and peripheral licenses) are in an unlicensed state or expired state. Your organization\'s current usage may have changed, please refresh the page to get the most up-to-date information. Your features are limited Your camera license has expired or been unlicensed for over 30 days, disabling primary functions. Please contact your reseller to reactivate.
